description: 67F acute chest pain — ambulance demo. Triggers: extraction, warfarin flag, missed follow-up (~3:11), NREMT gaps, vision cross-check (3:30), GPS timeline.

beats.speaker: paramedic
beats.text: Ma'am, I'm Alex with county EMS. Can you tell me what happened?

beats.speaker: patient
beats.text: I've had chest pain for about two hours. It started suddenly while I was gardening.

beats.speaker: paramedic
beats.text: Do you have any allergies to medications? Any current medications or medical history?

beats.speaker: patient
beats.text: I'm allergic to penicillin — I get a rash. I take lisinopril for my blood pressure.

beats.speaker: paramedic
beats.text: Any blood thinners or heart medications?

beats.speaker: patient
beats.text: Yes, warfarin. I had a heart valve replacement three years ago.

beats.speaker: paramedic
beats.text: Okay, getting your vitals. Blood pressure 158 over 94, heart rate 92, oxygen sat 96%.

beats.speaker: paramedic
beats.text: Let me get you on supplemental oxygen, four liters nasal cannula.

beats.speaker: paramedic
beats.text: ECG shows sinus rhythm. SpO2 coming up to 98. Let me document your information for the receiving hospital.

beats.speaker: paramedic
beats.text: We're going to load you into the unit now and head to County General — about eight minutes out.

beats.speaker: paramedic
beats.text: Oxygen sat holding at 97%. Keep the mask on please.

beats.speaker: paramedic
beats.text: I found a medication bag at the scene. Let me check what's in here before we arrive.

beats.rawText: Aspirin 325 mg tablet — take as directed

beats.speaker: paramedic
beats.text: I see an aspirin bottle here. Were you taking aspirin regularly?

beats.speaker: patient
beats.text: No, that's just in the medicine cabinet. I haven't taken any today.
